chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Before: Ahmed Ali M. Shaikh, CJ Yousuf Ali Sayeed, J CP No.D-730 of 2020 Syed Mehmood Akhtar Naqvi V Govt. of Sindh and others Hearing of case. 1. For orders on Misc. No.3520/2020 (exemption) 2. For hearing of Misc. No.20488/2020 (Order I Rule X CPC) 3. For hearing of main case. 06.12.2021 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Hassan Zaman, Advocate for the Internvenor M/s Baxter International Inc. Mr. Abdul Jalil A. Zubedi, AAG alongwith Ghulam Ali Lakho, Drug Inspector and Muhammad Shoaib, Chief Drug Inspector. ORDER Mr. Abdul Jalil A. Zubedi, learned AAG while placing on record a statement containing a report dated 03.12.2021 duly signed by the Additional Secretary, Health Department, Government of Sindh, (respondent No.3) submits that in light of the Report of the National Institute of Health, Islamabad, which had declared the subject drugs as substandard quality the matter was placed before the Provincial Quality Control Board, Sindh, in its meeting for taking decision to prosecute the case before the Special Drug Court, Karachi. He further submits that once minutes of the said meetings are formalized, the needful will be done without delay preferably within two weeks. In the wake of above development and statement made at the Bar petition stands disposed of alongwith listed misc. applications. Chief Justice Judge
